session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py -v` and report the full output. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the full output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on teleport tests with verbose output
